messages.author: zeneval
messages.text: I have Station G1 (esp32-wroom) kinda working (still some I2C issues, possibly GPS or RTC related). I'm happy to share a fork/branch if others want to help. I don't think bluetooth is working yet, But the radio and meshcore functionality are working fine (repeater can be administered over USB and lora) Is there any interest in a firmware for the station g1? Is anyone able to help? (edited)

messages.author: zeneval
embeds_html:
feat(station-g1): initial support for station g1 by gordol · Pull ...
it boots, and is configurable over usb/radio it's screaming about i2c issues in the console (likely no rtc, or gps pins are wrong or something?) more to come... (any help would be appreciated)

messages.author: PickleKing
messages.text: I’m very interested in this since I have a couple sitting around. But I’m not a programmer so I don’t know how to be helpful.
